policies.policy_description: A framework to manage countercyclical risks specific to the bank's operations.
policies.scope: Applicable to all business trading units and independent risk control units within the bank.
policies.objective: To ensure a robust risk management process that integrates counterparty credit risk measures.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Regular review of the overall risk management process, addressing documentation adequacy, organization of risk control units, and integration of counterparty credit risk measures.
subpolicies.control: Review must occur at least annually.

compliances.Description: Regular review of the overall risk management process, addressing documentation adequacy, organization of risk control units, and integration of counterparty credit risk measures.

compliances.ComplianceItemDescription: Regular review of the overall risk management process, addressing documentation adequacy, organization of risk control units, and integration of counterparty credit risk measures.
compliances.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Risk Management Process Review' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Approval process for counterparty credit risk models used by front office and back office personnel.
subpolicies.control: Models must be validated and approved by appropriate management.

compliances.Description: All counterparty credit risk models must undergo a thorough validation process to ensure their accuracy and reliability before being approved for use by front office and back office personnel.
compliances.Notes: AI-generated from Bank specific countercyclical buffer - Bank Specific Countercyclical Buffer
compliances.ComplianceItemDescription: All counterparty credit risk models must undergo a thorough validation process to ensure their accuracy and reliability before being approved for use by front office and back office personnel.
compliances.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Counterparty Credit Risk Model Validation' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

compliances.Description: Models must receive formal approval from designated management personnel to confirm that they meet the required standards and are suitable for use in risk assessment.
